understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the '+' goal gem tile by navigating through the level grid, using horizontal moves, clickable block removals, and gravity-driven falls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) trigger automated gravity-driven vertical movement (DOWN in this level). CLICK removes clickable tiles (e.g., 'x' blocks) without moving the player or triggering gravity. Landing on hazards (spikes 'u'/'v') ends the run. Gravity and fall destinations (left_landing/right_landing) guide safe movement toward lower y-values (falling upward on screen). Clicking breakable blocks (pressures/switches) can open new paths.
